title: SAP Delivery Manager (m/f/d)

Hands-on experience with SAP Solution Manager
Strong understanding of SAP S/4HANA migration and implementation
Broad knowledge of SAP products (S/4HANA Finance/Logistics, C/4HANA, SCM, GRC, SuccessFactors, Ariba)
Proven track record in end-to-end SAP solution design and delivery
Advanced planning and project management skills

matched_skills: Project and stakeholder management: coordinated cross-functional teams at HSBC and Hapag-Lloyd
Agile/Scrum experience: sprint ceremonies at Hapag-Lloyd (bonus skill partial hit)
German B1 (partial — JD requires fluent German)
missing_skills: SAP expertise of any kind (SAP Solution Manager, SAP Activate, SAP S/4HANA, SAP C/4HANA, SAP SCM, SAP GRC, SAP SuccessFactors, SAP Ariba) — ZERO SAP experience

Client proposal and statement-of-work preparation in an IT consulting context
Multiple years in SAP delivery management
core_responsibilities: Manage design and deployment of integrated end-to-end SAP solutions
Define and execute strategy for continuous delivery risk management
Translate business value into SAP solution benefits

Manage client expectations and foster strong client relationships

recommended_emphasis: This role is a poor match — application is strongly not recommended
The candidate has zero SAP experience, which is the core requirement for this role
No amount of CV reframing can substitute for the missing SAP technical knowledge
Candidate should focus efforts on pure PMO/programme governance roles instead
summary: Match score 8.3% — poor match. This SAP Delivery Manager role requires deep SAP technical expertise across multiple SAP product families, which the candidate entirely lacks. The candidate has no SAP experience whatsoever, and the role is fundamentally a technical SAP leadership position, not a programme governance or coordination role. Application is not recommended.
